tg.exp_basis: PSU/Udel Tg 463 K (190 C) +/-5%; honest band (NOT tight [459,463]/[459,459.1] exp_lookup single-points).
tg.reliability: well-resolved (real overestimate, NOT degenerate -- contrast PVC)
tg.tg_note: width_c=93.7 K GOOD; rates [40,160,400] r400=438.3 rigid-aromatic degenerate. Slowest-rate 498.4 K vs exp 463 K = FAIL (+2.5%): GENUINE rigid-aromatic PCFF + cooling-rate overestimate (fits well-resolved, width 49-165 K). Was mislabeled 'rate_extrapolated' though slope_gate_pass=False -> single_rate_fallback.

density.exp_basis: amorphous PSU/Udel 1.24 g/cm3 +/-5% (polymer_rules PSFO density null).
density.density_note: PASS but AT THE -4 to -5% FLOOR -- documented PCFF aromatic underdensity. (Honest +/-5% band; the tight DB [1.234,1.25] false-FAILs this expected bias.)

bulk_modulus.method_note: HEADLINE PASS (only in-band property) but LOW-END of [4.0,5.5]. Murnaghan validity by uniform gate (B0' in [4,20], converged, r2>0.999) + fluctuation agreement 3.4%. Consistent with uniformly-soft PCFF (density low, K low-end, Tg high).

provenance.review_note: PSU replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: K headline PASS (low-end); density PASS at -4/-5% floor; Tg FAIL (genuine rigid-aromatic overestimate, well-resolved); uniformly-soft PCFF. Honest bands.
